title: Continuous Internal Evaluation (CIE) Optimization Workflow
description: A flowchart illustrating the cyclical process of applying Continuous Internal Evaluation to an optimization technique, showing how feedback is used to refine and improve the solution.
relationships: A cyclical flow where 'Initial Solution Generation' leads to 'Performance Evaluation', which feeds into 'Data Collection & Analysis', which informs 'Parameter/Strategy Adjustment', creating a new 'Optimized Solution' that loops back to the start for re-evaluation.
